_**Agent (claude-opus-4-7 2026-05-29 15:59:33Z)**_

The change is purely a UI styling addition in a mockup file: it extends two color-lookup helper functions (`roleColor`, `roleBg`) to map two new constant role enum values (`VIEWER_ROLES.GENERAL`, `VIEWER_ROLES.VESSEL`) to colors. No new sinks (no exec/SQL/HTML render/filesystem/network/auth), no new sources of untrusted input, and the comparison is against compile-time constants. The file lives under `docs/vercel_mockup/` (a design mockup), not in a privileged code path.

No security-relevant issues introduced by this diff.
